platform-common/src/main/java/com/platfo.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices enforced by stricter compilers or linters in the Java 21 ecosystem.

platform-config/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Refactor application.yml from nested YAML structure to flat dot-notation properties style.

platform-config/src/main/resources/boots.general_idea: Remove the bootstrap.yml configuration file as it is no longer needed or supported in the updated Spring Boot version.

platform-test/src/main/java/com/platform.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
platform-test/src/main/java/com/platform.before: String.format("Welcome to %s running on port %s!", applicationName, serverPort)

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used in code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin version to 3.15.1-SNAPSHOT.
Simplify maven-compiler-plugin configuration by using java.version for release and removing redundant source/target tags.
